positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric illustration featuring a mystical, glowing winged fox (kitsune) intertwined with celestial astronomical motifs. The composition should be centered and radial, suitable for a t-shirt print. Incorporate clean lines, vibrant neon accents (electric blues, magenta, cyan) contrasting against deep midnight blue and charcoal black backgrounds. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau and futuristic vector graphics, using bold silhouette elements and intricate linework. Include stylized constellations, crescent moons, and abstract flowing energy patterns connecting the fox and the stars. Use high contrast, clean vector aesthetic, perfect for DTG printing. Studio shot, flat lay presentation, vibrant colors, high detail, symmetry.
